caption: A man with grey hair wearing a dark green t-shirt and another man with red hair and a beard wearing a grey t-shirt and a necklace sit side-by-side in a room. Behind them is a television displaying the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in orange letters and a soundbar. Below the TV is a shelf filled with CDs. A smaller video screen is superimposed in the foreground, showing a dark, geometric ceiling pattern with a central dark object and the text "The severity of Shadbani" and "Alain's enmity." The man in the green shirt maintains a neutral, slightly skeptical expression, while the man in the grey shirt holds his hand to his chin in a thoughtful or concerned gesture. Across the sequence, the men remain nearly motionless, and the content on both the main television screen and the superimposed video screen remains consistent.
